failures.description: The agent misread or incorrectly reasoned over the ProductCatalogSearch results and selected item_id "1096508426" at 46.13 instead of the cheapest available item, item_id "9665100170" at 45.39.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user wanted the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The relevant tool output was available before the failing decision: at index 3, the sorted results show item_id "9665100170" is available and costs 45.39, which is cheaper than item_id "1096508426" at 46.13. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer that contradicts the tool output by selecting a later, more expensive available item. This is not an invalid tool invocation or unsupported intent; it is a reasoning error over the returned tool results.
